message:
chore(phase2c): refresh compat-closure attestation + evidence pack

Regenerates the COMPAT-CLOSURE-I attestation pair to pick up updated
parity report SHAs for FP-P2C-001:
  parity_report.decode_proof.json   8332aa8b -> 520f01c3
  parity_report.json                cdc0bd3f -> b1787b46
  parity_report.raptorq.json        f2021a13 -> c85798cf

The summary's attestation_signature is rederived from the new evidence
pack contents (63e30eaa -> 8a43b6c8), and generated_unix_ms in both
files updates to 1777158167003. coverage_percent stays at 100,
strict_zero_drift stays true, hardened_allowlisted_total stays at 2 —
no regressions in the closure invariants, just a fresh
attestation matching the upstream parity reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 }
